violations.text: The following were observed in poor repair: -reach-in door handle (broken, taped) -reach-in gaskets (on order) New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The floor tiles throughout the facility were observed cracked and/or missing. PIC stated repairs are to be scheduled. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (pizza peel) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items brought to cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Chowder, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per observation, chowder was placed hot in the reach-in refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
Thermometer in the small reach-in (near ice machine) was observed to be inaccurate. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The pizza peel is stored on an unclean surface (side of oven) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The following were observed in poor repair: -reach-in door handled (broken, taped) -mixer paddle (chipped paint). New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the oven have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
Leaks were observed at the faucets of the hand-washing sink (kitchen entrance) and the on-line prep sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
The floor tiles throughout the facility were observed cracked and/or missing. PIC stated repairs are to be scheduled. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2026
